$comment: Cluster-F F4 (int_narrowing): C 6.3.1.3 same-signedness implicit integer narrowing (gate intSameSignednessNarrows). Each narrowing is from a RUNTIME source (non-literal) in all four assignment positions (init/assign/arg/return) so it is a real red-on-disable: with the gate off the program fails to compile (S0003). Witnesses TRUNCATION (low-N-bits value) AND that integer promotion still computes in int. The `release` arm runs the shipped optimizing pipeline over the new narrowing Cast/Trunc shapes. exit 42 == every conversion correct on the target.
